problem id: 62dba403
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11110111 -> 10110111
  00101001 -> 01001010
  00010100 -> 10100001
  11011000 -> 11001101
  10011001 -> 11000001
  00001100 -> 01100000
  01110000 -> 10000111
  11101011 -> 01010110
  11010111 -> 10110101
  00101101 -> 01101010

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 10011001
